_comment: Manual sign-offs: dated human judgments the runner can't automate. These three are n/a for a docs/skill distribution repo; each records why. Review and re-date before merge.

TEST-03.note: n/a — a docs/skill distribution repo has no runtime 'must-never-exist' invariants to guard with red-on-arrival tests. The runner's own behavior is exercised by fixtures upstream in the canonical baseline-v2 source.

TEST-04.note: n/a — this repo ships no acceptance-criteria specs to reconcile against reference code; rules.json is the specification and check.mjs is its reference implementation.

CTX-04.note: n/a — no frozen/consolidated/LOCKED docs in this repo. REFERENCE.md is a hand-maintained reference (its rule table is regenerated from rules.json) and carries no supersede banner because nothing here is superseded.
